title: lobelia diastateoides
intro: Lobelia diastateoides, also known as Chinese Lobelia or Chinese Puke Weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Lobelia diastateoides has been used in Chinese medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of Lobelia diastateoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. Lobelia diastateoides is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be found in capsule or powder form, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
